---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement to Arc
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A short, clear description of the feature you're proposing.

## Problem or Motivation
What problem does this solve? What's missing from Arc today that this would address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this to work. Be as specific as you can — the more detail, the easier it is to evaluate and implement.

## Which Component?
- [ ] ArcDaemon
- [ ] ArcConsole
- [ ] ArcPortal
- [ ] ArcShared
- [ ] Arc Server (planned)
- [ ] Other / Cross-cutting

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why is your proposed solution the right one?

## Who Benefits?
- [ ] IT Administrators (ArcConsole users)
- [ ] End users (ArcPortal users)
- [ ] Developers contributing to Arc
- [ ] All of the above

## Additional Context
Any mockups, examples from other tools, or references that help illustrate the idea.
